page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7se.xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz. It features 4 physical cores and 4 vCPUs, providing a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio. The system is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, translating to 4.0 GB per core. It operates on a KVM hypervisor, lacks local storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate moderate single-core performance alongside weaker multi-core scaling. Single-core tests, such as stress-ng and Geekbench, place the server in the average category, supported by hardware-level instruction sets including AVX-512 and cryptography acceleration. However, multi-core benchmarks, including multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and Geekbench multi-core, fall into the lower percentiles. Memory bandwidth for large, uncached blocks is also relatively low, though PassMark memory scores remain average.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance represents a standard general-purpose tier. The lack of local storage requires external block storage attachment, which should be factored into resource planning. Due to its average single-core capabilities but weaker multi-core and database performance, the ecs.g7se.xlarge is best suited for lightweight general-purpose workloads, basic web serving, single-threaded applications, and small-scale development or testing environments.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7se.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine based on the x86_64 architecture and powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B processor. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, it delivers 4 vCPUs across 4 physical cores at a clock speed of 2.9 GHz, paired with 16.0 GB of RAM. The instance features a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps and contains no local storage, requiring external block storage. Performance benchmarks show average single-core CPU execution and cryptographic processing, though multi-core scaling and memory bandwidth fall into lower percentiles. This hardware profile makes the instance suitable for general-purpose workloads, lightweight web serving, and single-threaded applications that do not demand high-throughput database operations or intensive parallel computing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7se.xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16.0 GB of RAM, and a 2 Gbps baseline network speed, running on a KVM hypervisor with no local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7se.xlarge is a general-purpose KVM instance with 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16.0 GB of RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated four-core x86_64 virtual server with balanced memory allocation and hardware-accelerated cryptography for general-purpose workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B processor with 4 physical cores and 4 vCPUs
16.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
Baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps on a KVM hypervisor
No integrated local storage, requiring external block storage solutions
Average single-core performance with hardware-supported AVX-512 and AES acceleration
Best suited for lightweight web serving, single-threaded tasks, and development environments
